biography: Joakim graced the fairways of the Hector Trophée on one occasion, making a singular foray into this esteemed pair competition. His involvement, though brief, marked his presence within the tournament's history, despite his home club affiliations not being recorded.

During his lone venture, Joakim applied himself with diligent focus, navigating the unique challenges posed by the course and the competitive field. Despite his earnest efforts, success in either the coveted Hector Trophée for his pairing or the individual Victor Trophy remained elusive, underscoring the formidable competitive nature of the event.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Joakim will not be among the active competitors. Having since withdrawn from Hector events, his singular appearance stands as a distinctive, albeit concluded, chapter in the tournament's evolving narrative.
